title: dubautia platyphylla
intro: Dubautia platyphylla, also known as the naupaka plant, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dubautia platyphylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
